name: quality-loop-deerflow
description: DeerFlow research sidecar integration for quality-loop v3. Provides explicit /research entrypoint for long-horizon research tasks with proper output isolation.

commands.name: research-status
commands.description: Check status of ongoing research tasks

agents.name: deerflow-runner
agents.description: Research-only sidecar agent for DeerFlow operations

skills.name: deerflow-research
skills.description: Reusable DeerFlow research operations with output isolation

output_isolation.constraint: DeerFlow outputs MUST NOT write to shared state files
